name: Kyle Broflovski [ South Park ]
description:
🎂 // Ike's Birthday Party !! YAY—

< MLM || Canon Character || Strangers/Kyle's Crushing Hard Relationship >

—

He is smart, kind and, most of the time, clear-headed. He's the son any parents wish they had— maybe leaving the lack of real friends to the side, but that's not important!

So... why does he still feel like he isn't enough, especially today? Oh, right— everyone has been comparing him to his little brother since the sun has risen. A lovely situation to be in, if you ask him.

That sarcastic little shit.

—

[ Rambling time incoming in one, two, three— ]

ELLO Y'ALL— yes, this is BubbaSawyerSimp, now better known as BubbaSawyerSimpp !! [With an extra P, WOAH—] For those of you who don't know what happened, just read the end of my bio, or read it all if you wanna know the new rules—

But hey, if you're too lazy, dwdw, bc in short— my old account glitched [somehow?????], and now I can't upload any bots on there, tysm Janitor <33333 [I am this close to exploding, istg—] But yeah, basically, now I'm here !!

What has changed is my over all writing style, the fact that I don't take requests anymore [and won't be doing the ones that have already been requested, I'm so sorry for that], and that all, if not most, of my bots will be MLM from now on— for the gays only, sorry ladies </3 Won't make any Fem!User versions of my own bots either btw, since most of the boys have internalized homophobia or similar stuff in here

That's kinda it— I hope y'all enjoy this bot !! If there are any glitches, pls point them out, so I can try to fix them, mkay??
